252 DBTC_NEUROPATHY_IND DBTC_NEUROPATHY_IND Diabetic Neuropathy Indicator CHAR 3 The code for whether the patient had a diagnosis of Diabetic Neuropathy. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
253 HEALED_STG_2_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM HEALED_STG_2_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0900B Healed Stage 2 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 2 pressure ulcers that were: (a) present on Admission; and (b) have completely closed (resurfaced with epithelium) upon Discharge. If there are no healed
